---
title: "Apéndice Interoperable"
subtitle: "Dispositivo dinámico de síntesis de conocimiento (FAIR/CARE / WebAssembly)"
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
    # 🆕 ESTA LÍNEA ES LA CLAVE: Desactiva las restricciones del iframe de Quarto
    resources: 
      - "*-shinylive-app/*"
---

<!-- Script de Soberanía Digital: Habilitar COOP/COEP en GitHub Pages -->
<script>
  if (window.location.hostname.includes("github.io") && !window.crossOriginIsolated) {
    const swUrl = "https://jsdelivr.net";
    navigator.serviceWorker.register(swUrl).then(() => {
      // Recarga transparente para aplicar los permisos de aislamiento de origen requeridos por WebAssembly
      window.location.reload();
    }).catch(err => console.error("Error al registrar service worker:", err));
  }
</script>

A continuación se despliega el nodo modular de consulta biológica interactiva co-creado para el proyecto interdomestic, ejecutado mediante WebAssembly directamente en su navegador:

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 500

library(shiny)
library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)
library(rgbif)
library(metafor)

# ==========================================
# DEFINICIÓN DE MÓDULOS INTEGRADOS
# ==========================================
biodiversityUI <- function(id) {
  ns <- NS(id)
  tagList(
    wellPanel(
      style = "background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;",
      fluidRow(
        column(6, textInput(ns("sp1"), "Especie A (Azul):", "Panthera onca")),
        column(6, textInput(ns("sp2"), "Especie B (Rojo):", "Puma concolor"))
      ),
      fluidRow(
        column(6, numericInput(ns("max_reg"), "Registros máx:", 50, min = 10)),
        column(6, br(), actionButton(ns("run"), "Sincronizar Ecosistemas", class = "btn-primary", style = "width: 100%;"))
      )
    ),
    leafletOutput(ns("map"), height = "350px"),
    br(),
    verbatimTextOutput(ns("metadata"))
  )
}

biodiversityServer <- function(id) {
  moduleServer(id, function(input, output, session) {
    datos <- eventReactive(input$run, {
      req(input$sp1, input$sp2)
      occ1 <- occ_search(scientificName = input$sp1, limit = input$max_reg, hasCoordinate = TRUE)$data
      occ2 <- occ_search(scientificName = input$sp2, limit = input$max_reg, hasCoordinate = TRUE)$data
      df1 <- if(!is.null(occ1) && "decimalLatitude" %in% colnames(occ1)) occ1 %>% select(decimalLatitude, decimalLongitude, scientificName, datasetKey) else NULL
      df2 <- if(!is.null(occ2) && "decimalLatitude" %in% colnames(occ2)) occ2 %>% select(decimalLatitude, decimalLongitude, scientificName, datasetKey) else NULL
      bind_rows(df1, df2)
    })
    
    output$map <- renderLeaflet({
      df <- datos()
      m <- leaflet() %>% addTiles() %>% addSimpleGraticule(interval = 10)
      if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(m %>% setView(0, 0, 2))
      
      sp1_clean <- trimws(tolower(input$sp1))
      sp2_clean <- trimws(tolower(input$sp2))
      
      df_color <- df %>% mutate(color_asignado = case_when(
        grepl(sp1_clean, tolower(scientificName), fixed = TRUE) ~ "#2563eb",
        grepl(sp2_clean, tolower(scientificName), fixed = TRUE) ~ "#dc2626",
        TRUE ~ "#64748b"
      ))
      
      m %>% addCircleMarkers(data = df_color, lng = ~decimalLongitude, lat = ~decimalLatitude,
                               color = ~color_asignado, radius = 6, fillOpacity = 0.7, popup = ~scientificName)
    })
    
    output$metadata <- renderText({
      df <- datos(); req(df)
      paste0("--- METADATA PROFILE (FAIR/CARE) ---\nEstandar: Darwin Core\nDatasets: ", length(unique(df$datasetKey)))
    })
  })
}

metaUI <- function(id) {
  ns <- NS(id)
  tagList(
    sliderInput(ns("hetero"), "Heterogeneidad:", min = 0, max = 1, value = 0.3, step = 0.1),
    plotOutput(ns("forest")),
    verbatimTextOutput(ns("results"))
  )
}

metaServer <- function(id) {
  moduleServer(id, function(input, output, session) {
    res_react <- reactive({
      set.seed(123); k <- 8
      rma(yi = rnorm(k, 0.5, 0.1 + input$hetero), vi = runif(k, 0.02, 0.05), method = "FE")
    })
    output$forest <- renderPlot({ forest(res_react(), xlab = "Effect Size", theme = "light") })
    output$results <- renderText({ paste("Efecto Global:", round(res_react()$b, 3)) })
  })
}

# ==========================================
# INTERFAZ Y SERVIDOR CENTRAL DE SHINY
# ==========================================
ui <- fluidPage(
  tabsetPanel(
    tabPanel("🗺️ Biodiversidad", br(), biodiversityUI("bio")),
    tabPanel("📊 Meta-Análisis", br(), metaUI("meta"))
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  biodiversityServer("bio")
  metaServer("meta")
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
